title: Synthetix API Schemas
description: JSON Schema definitions derived from the Synthetix API OpenAPI specification

get__circulating_supply_response.title: Returns combined SNX circulating supply from L1 and L2. Response
get__circulating_supply_response.description: Returns combined SNX circulating supply from L1 and L2.

get__debt_pool_comp_response.title: Returns outstanding composition of Synthetix debt pool. If `key` query parameter is not provided it returns an array of objects (all assets). If `key` query parameter is provided it returns an object (with requested asset). If `net` query parameter is not provided it returns combined data for both networks. If `net` query parameter is provided it returns data for requested network. Response
get__debt_pool_comp_response.description: Returns outstanding composition of Synthetix debt pool. If `key` query parameter is not provided it returns an array of objects (all assets). If `key` query parameter is provided it returns an object (with requested asset). If `net` query parameter is not provided it returns combined data for both networks. If `net` query parameter is provided it returns data for requested network.

get__health_response.title: Returns API health status. Protected with basic auth. Only for internal use. Response
get__health_response.description: Returns API health status. Protected with basic auth. Only for internal use.

get__staking_ratio_response.title: Returns SNX staking ratio between L1 and L2. Response
get__staking_ratio_response.description: Returns SNX staking ratio between L1 and L2.

get__total_supply_response.title: Returns SNX total supply for L1 and L2. Response
get__total_supply_response.description: Returns SNX total supply for L1 and L2.

get__LiquidatorRewards_balance_response.title: Returns escrowed SNX balance from LiquidatorRewards contract. Response
get__LiquidatorRewards_balance_response.description: Returns escrowed SNX balance from LiquidatorRewards contract.

get__RewardEscrow_escrowed_balance_respo.title: Returns escrowed SNX balance from RewardEscrow contract. Response
get__RewardEscrow_escrowed_balance_respo.description: Returns escrowed SNX balance from RewardEscrow contract.

get__RewardEscrowV2_escrowed_balance_res.title: Returns escrowed SNX balance from RewardEscrowV2 contract. Response
get__RewardEscrowV2_escrowed_balance_res.description: Returns escrowed SNX balance from RewardEscrowV2 contract.

get__stats_perps_volume_response.title: Returns total volume figures across all perps deployments. Response
get__stats_perps_volume_response.description: Returns total volume figures across all perps deployments.

get__SynthetixBridgeEscrow_balance_respo.title: Returns escrowed SNX balance from SynthetixBridgeEscrow contract. Response
get__SynthetixBridgeEscrow_balance_respo.description: Returns escrowed SNX balance from SynthetixBridgeEscrow contract.

get__SynthetixEscrow_vested_balance_resp.title: Returns vested SNX balance from SynthetixEscrow contract. Response
get__SynthetixEscrow_vested_balance_resp.description: Returns vested SNX balance from SynthetixEscrow contract.

get__v3_arbitrum_sc_pool_apy_all_respons.title: Returns current APY for Spartan Council Pool on Arbitrum. Response
get__v3_arbitrum_sc_pool_apy_all_respons.description: Returns current APY for Spartan Council Pool on Arbitrum.

get__v3_arbitrum_sc_pool_apy_history_res.title: Returns historical APY for Spartan Council Pool on Arbitrum. Response
get__v3_arbitrum_sc_pool_apy_history_res.description: Returns historical APY for Spartan Council Pool on Arbitrum.

get__v3_arbitrum_sc_pool_apy_response.description: Returns current APY for Spartan Council Pool on Arbitrum.

get__v3_base_issued_debt_response.title: Fetch sum of usd value of issued debt each collateral. Response
get__v3_base_issued_debt_response.description: Checks the cache first, and if not found, fetches issued debt data from Postgres for the given account ID.

get__v3_base_lt_leaderboard_response.title: Returns leverage token leaderboard on base. Response
get__v3_base_lt_leaderboard_response.description: Returns leverage token leaderboard on base.

get__v3_base_lt_trades_response.description: Returns leverage token trades on base.

get__v3_base_rewards_claimed_response.description: Checks the cache first, and if not found, fetches claimed rewards data from Postgres for the given account ID.

get__v3_base_sc_pool_apy_all_response.description: Returns current APY for Spartan Council Pool on Arbitrum.

get__v3_base_sc_pool_apy_response.description: Returns current APY for Spartan Council Pool on Base.

get__v3_base_snx_buyback_response.description: Returns SNX buyback details on Base.

get__v3_mainnet_issued_debt_response.description: Checks the cache first, and if not found, fetches issued debt data from Postgres for the given account ID.

get__v3_mainnet_sc_pool_apy_all_response.description: Returns current APY for Spartan Council Pool on Mainnet.

get__v3_top_asset_response.description: Returns the current top performing asset and it's APR and APY estimated from past 7 day performance.

get__v3_tvl_response.title: Returns total value locked across all Synthetix V3 deployments. Response
get__v3_tvl_response.description: Returns total value locked across all Synthetix V3 deployments.

get__v3_tvl420_response.title: Retrieve TVL data for a specific network and time span. Response
get__v3_tvl420_response.description: Fetches Total Value Locked (TVL) data from the cache or PostgreSQL for the specified blockchain network and time span.

ts.description: The timestamp of the TVL data.
